howItWorks.intro: This tire size comparison calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Tire Diameter
rules.explanation: Rim diameter plus twice the sidewall height.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much tire size difference is acceptable?
faq.a: Stay within 3% of the original diameter to avoid speedometer and handling issues.

faq.q: Does tire size affect gas mileage?
faq.a: Larger/wider tires can reduce MPG by 1-3% due to increased rolling resistance.

howWeCalculate.intro: This tire size comparison calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
